current_lesson.component_label: consensus_conviction (30-indicator) gated jointly with tv_signal_count and internal_regime
current_lesson.latest_lesson_text: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView returns zero confirming signals, treat the 75% sizing multiplier as a hard ceiling AND require the 30-indicator conviction to exceed 55% before entry — internal-only MOMENTUM below that conviction is the weakest configuration in the confirmation stack.
current_lesson.latest_rule: if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0 and consensus_conviction < 0.55: veto_entry() else if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0: size *= 0.75

history.rule: if commitment_score >= 0.90 and rate_differential_zscore is None: return ICTVeto  # require non-null macro confirmation when price-action is maximal
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5 (treat as unconfirmed; require library_match before full size)
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size *= 0.5  # OOD unanimity, no validated analog
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze, log as UNRELIABLE
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # untested extreme, halve exposure
if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.5  # unconfirmed extremity; require hist_hr >= 0.60 for full size
if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.40: size *= 0.0  # veto. elif consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and hist_hr >= 0.60: size *= 1.0  # full
if consensus_conviction >= 0.99 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.5; if news_high_impact_days_until == 0: veto_new_entries == True
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier = min(size_multiplier, 0.5)
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.0  # freeze until a green_match precedent exists or hist_hr populates
if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.65: veto_trade()  # require historical hit-rate confirmation when no green matches exist
if consensus_conv >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.5  # high conviction with zero memory match = novelty trap, halve size
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.6  # require historical match before full size on extreme-conviction reads

if consensus_dir in ('SHORT','LONG') and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.50: size_multiplier *= 0.0  # veto. elif green_matches == 0 and hist_hr >= 0.55: size_multiplier *= 0.75  # novel config but historical edge holds
if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr == 0.0: return RegimeFreeze(pair)  # even if conv >= 0.50
if tv_signal_count == 0 and max(pair.conviction for pair in consensus) < 0.33: return RegimeVeto('NO_TRADE_uncommitted_flow')
if consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr < 0.50: veto_entry() # require at least one historical green match before trusting 100% conviction
if consensus_conv >= 0.95 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: return ConsensusVeto('no_historical_analog')
if consensus_conv == 1.0 and consensus_hist_hr == 0.0 and green_matches == 0: return Veto('OOD_consensus_no_precedent')
if consensus.conviction >= 0.95 and consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr <= 0.05: veto_entry()  # require at least one historical green analog before trusting extreme conviction
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size *= 0.5  # require historical analog before full size
if consensus_conviction >= 0.83 and green_matches == 0 and tradingview_confidence < 0.70: size_multiplier = min(size_multiplier, 0.50)
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.6  # require at least 1 matched historical analog before full size
if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # require historical anchor before full size
if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: veto_entry() # require at least one historical green_match before trusting high-conviction direction
if decision.signal_layers_active == [] or decision.commitment_score is None: return ForexVeto('untraced_entry — no gated signal path'); log for audit.

if decision.why_this_trade.startswith('RECONSTRUCTED') or decision.signal_layers_active == []: flag UNRELIABLE, block auto-execution, require pipeline re-entry with populated commitment_score before sizing.
if consensus_dir != 'NEUTRAL' and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: return ConsensusVeto()  # require green_matches >= 1 before sizing on 30-indicator direction
if direction contradicts market_structure_bias AND no CHOCH/BOS in trade direction AND not price_at_OB_or_FVG_zone: veto trade regardless of rate_diff_z magnitude
if entry_context['hold_days_est'] > 30 and sum(1 for layer in signal_layers_active if layer.startswith('✓')) < 3: return ForexVeto  # long-horizon macro needs structural confirmation now
if signal_direction != htf_structure_direction and not structure_shift_confirmed and abs(rate_diff_z) < 1.2: veto_trade()
if consensus_conviction >= 0.60 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # freeze up-sizing until a historical analog confirms
if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size *= 0.5 (or veto if session != London Grade A)
if consensus_conviction > 0.85 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier = 0.5  # untested-config penalty until >=1 historical match exists
if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0 and consensus_conviction < 0.55: veto_entry() else if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0: size *= 0.75

in_progress_themes.latest_lesson_text: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView shows 0 confirming signals (confidence <= 65%), the 30-indicator single-pair conviction must clear 100% before that pair is tradable at full internal size.
in_progress_themes.latest_rule: if regime_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65 and consensus.conviction < 1.00: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # only AUDNZD (100% conv, SHORT) survives full sizing today

history.rule: if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count_2h == 0: sizing_multiplier = min(sizing_multiplier, 0.50)
if external_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime == 'MOMENTUM' and pair_consensus_conv < 0.50: veto_trade() else if sizing_multiplier <= 0.75: proceed_at_reduced_size()
if regime_confirmation.source == 'internal_only' and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65: sizing_multiplier = min(sizing_multiplier, 0.60)
if regime_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65 and consensus.conviction < 1.00: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # only AUDNZD (100% conv, SHORT) survives full sizing today

codified_lessons.lesson: Grade labels invert quality. Score is signal. Grade is noise.
Session quality is categorical. NY_PM is not weaker — it is anti-edge.
pd_alignment anti-predicts success. Premium/discount zone describes retail traps, not institutional flow.
Pullback entries outperform aligned entries 3:1 in R-multiple. Entry timing within direction matters as much as directio
VIX term structure reveals carry regime health. Modest contango = healthy carry environment. Steep contango = nervousnes
The exact target ICT setup: London session + Grade A + market committed. This is the only configuration with institution
Macro momentum has pair-specific half-lives. There is no universal hold period. Each pair's macro signal exhausts at a d
Tighten USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate from 15 to 13. Bull market + VIX>13 = safe-haven flow corrupts rate signal.
Validated knowledge has an expiry date. REST_MODE is a gate, not a destination.

provenance.note: Measures Oracle's learning process (time-to-converge / time-to-codify, frequency). Read-only over Oracle's own reflections — not a trading input.
